creator: girgen@FreeBSD.org
text:
Fix is incomplete:

In file included from qglxconvenience.cpp:47:
./qglxconvenience_p.h:58:10: fatal error: 'GL/glx.h' file not found
#include <GL/glx.h>
         ^~~~~~~~~~
1 error generated.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[2]: stopped in /wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/qt5-gui/work/kde-qtbase-5.15.5p165/src/platformsupport/glxconvenience
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/qt5-gui/work/kde-qtbase-5.15.5p165/src/platformsupport
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/qt5-gui

---

So, either qt5-gui should not have an optional knob to turn off X11, or qt5-gui should be patches even more to accept building without GL.

Suggestions?
